# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: three-tier-vnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/16
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Virtual Network
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.1.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the web tier subnet
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.2.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the app tier subnet
  databaseSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.3.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the database tier subnet
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
variables:
  webNsgName: "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '-web-nsg')]"
  appNsgName: "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '-app-nsg')]"
  databaseNsgName: "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '-database-nsg')]"
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    name: "[variables('webNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowHTTPS
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '443'
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Allow
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
        - name: AllowHTTP
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '80'
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Allow
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
        - name: DenyAllInbound
          properties:
            protocol: '*'
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Deny
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    name: "[variables('appNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowWebTier
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '8080'
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Allow
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
        - name: DenyAllInbound
          properties:
            protocol: '*'
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Deny
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    name: "[variables('databaseNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowAppTier
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '1433'
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Allow
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
        - name: DenyAllInbound
          properties:
            protocol: '*'
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            access: Deny
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('databaseNsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      enableDdosProtection: false
      subnets:
        - name: web-subnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
        - name: app-subnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
        - name: database-subnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('databaseSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('databaseNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            serviceEndpoints:
              - service: Microsoft.Sql
                locations:
                  - "[parameters('location')]"
outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  webSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), 'web-subnet')]"
  appSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), 'app-subnet')]"
  databaseSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), 'database-subnet')]"
